news.headline: Hong Kong urged to be more proactive in removing barriers with Shenzhen
news.summary:
Hong Kong should take a more proactive approach to removing barriers hindering the cross-border flow of people, capital, goods and data with neighbouring Shenzhen, analysts have said, as the new leadership of the mainland China tech hub signals a fresh push for deeper integration.

news.headline: The week in pictures: Orban ousted in Hungary, Pope Leo's Africa tour and Trump as Jesus
news.summary: Hungary ended 16 years of Viktor Orban’s rule, Pope Leo XIV began his first African tour with a historic first papal visit to Algeria and US President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated image depicting himself as Jesus. Here is a look back at some of the week’s most striking images.

news.headline: Displaced Lebanese families return home despite Israeli attacks
news.summary: Families travel south to inspect destroyed homes, unsure whether to stay as concerns about renewed conflict increase.

news.headline: A petition called 'Lebanon will not be the next Gaza' calls on French leaders to take action
news.summary: As France's President Emmanuel Macron is seen as a key guarantor of the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, civil society actors have launched a petition titled 'Lebanon will not be the next Gaza', calling on him to act. The initiative has been signed by numerous French public figures. Marie Yared

news.headline: Iran: Prolonged conflict reshapes view of the regime, analyst says
news.summary: FRANCE 24’s guest Mehran Kamrave, Director of the Iranian Studies Unit at the Arab Center for Research and Policy Studies, analyses Iran’s strategy towards the United States, highlighting three key levers the regime can rely on: sanctions, the nuclear programme, and control over the Strait of Hormuz

news.headline: Humanoid robots speed past humans in Beijing half-marathon
news.summary: Humanoid robots raced alongside humans in a half-marathon in Beijing.
